mapper.select: SELECT id, contest_id, user_id, reviewer_name, role, status, create_by, create_time FROM jst_contest_reviewer WHERE contest_id = #{contestId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY role DESC, id ASC
SELECT contest_id FROM jst_contest_reviewer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO jst_contest_reviewer (contest_id, user_id, reviewer_name, role, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{entity.contestId}, #{entity.userId}, #{entity.reviewerName}, #{entity.role}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.createBy}, NOW())

INSERT IGNORE INTO jst_contest_reviewer (contest_id, user_id, reviewer_name, role, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES
(#{item.contestId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.reviewerName}, #{item.role}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM jst_contest_reviewer WHERE contest_id = #{contestId} AND user_id = #{userId}
